title: Conservative
description: Conservative investors prioritize capital preservation and lower volatility over high returns.
content: Conservative investors prioritize capital preservation and lower volatility over high returns.

title: Moderate
description: Moderate investors seek a balance between growth and stability, accepting some volatility for potentially higher returns.
content: Moderate investors seek a balance between growth and stability, accepting some volatility for potentially higher returns.

title: Aggressive
description: Aggressive investors focus on long-term growth and are willing to tolerate larger short-term price swings.
content: Aggressive investors focus on long-term growth and are willing to tolerate larger short-term price swings.
